name: customer_support_agent
description: Intelligent customer support ticket analysis with classification, sentiment detection, urgency assessment, and response suggestions. Extracts key information, detects customer emotions, and provides actionable recommendations for support teams.

environment_variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: OpenAI API key for GPT models

environment_variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Anthropic API key for Claude models

example_usage:
```python
import asyncio
from customer_support import analyze_support_ticket

async def main():
    result = await analyze_support_ticket(
        message="I've been trying to log in for 3 hours and keep getting error 403. This is unacceptable!",
        analysis_depth="detailed"
    )
    print(f"Category: {result.category.primary_category}")
    print(f"Urgency: {result.urgency.urgency_level}")
    print(f"Sentiment: {result.sentiment.overall_sentiment}")
    print(f"\nSuggested Response:\n{result.response_suggestion.suggested_response}")

asyncio.run(main())
```
post_add_instructions: This agent analyzes customer support tickets with comprehensive classification, urgency assessment, sentiment detection, and response suggestions. Use analysis_depth='basic' for quick triage, 'detailed' for standard analysis, or 'comprehensive' for in-depth insights. The agent can classify tickets, detect urgency, analyze sentiment, extract key information, and suggest appropriate responses with escalation recommendations.
